start.description: Here you can browse AI models, chat with them, purchase packages, and manage your profile.
start.ready: ✅ Bot is ready! Use /help to see all commands.

auth.login_prompt: 🔑 Enter your email to log in:
auth.invalid_email: ❌ Invalid email format. Please try again.
auth.otp_expired: ⏰ Code expired. Please use /login to try again.
auth.not_logged_in: ⚠️ You are not logged in. Use /login.

billing.title: 💰 Your Account

admin.title: 👑 Admin Panel
admin.unauthorized: ❌ You do not have admin privileges.
admin.broadcast_prompt: 📤 Enter the message to broadcast to all users:

common.rate_limit: ⏰ Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

help.title: 🛡️ Help
help.commands:
Available commands:

/start - Start the bot
/login - Log in
/profile - Profile info
/models - AI models
/ask - Chat with models
/buy - Buy a package
/topup - Top up account
/support - Support
/lang - Change language
/help - Help

Admin commands:
/admin - Admin panel
/stats - Statistics
/broadcast - Broadcast message
/addmodel - Add model
/removemodel - Remove model
